message.content:
You are the Prepare Agent. You are given a list of papers, searching results of the papers on GitHub.

List of papers:
1. Vibe AIGC: A New Paradigm for Content Generation via Agentic Orchestration (https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.04575)
   - Type: methodological_inspiration
   - Justification: Core inspiration paper proposing the Vibe paradigm — agentic orchestration with Meta-Planner to bridge the intent-execution gap in generative AI. VibeMed adapts this framework to the medical and healthcare domain.
   - Usage: Adapt the hierarchical multi-agent orchestration architecture (Meta-Planner, decomposition of user intent into executable agent workflows) from content generation to medical image computing and clinical decision support.

Searching results of the papers on GitHub:

Query 1: Vibe AIGC agentic orchestration
    Name: jmanhype/vibe-aigc
    Description: Agentic orchestration for content generation based on arXiv:2602.04575
    Link: https://github.com/jmanhype/vibe-aigc
    Stars: 0

Query 2: medical AI agent orchestration multi-agent
    Name: ZouhairChoufa/MediAlert-SMA_V2
    Description: MediAlert SMA is an enterprise-grade AI orchestration platform for Emergency Medical Services (EMS). Multi-Agent Systems (LLMs), real-time geospatial intelligence, and automated medical triage.
    Link: https://github.com/ZouhairChoufa/MediAlert-SMA_V2
    Stars: 2

    Name: ruslanmv/Medical-AI-Assistant-System
    Description: A full-stack, multi-agent healthcare assistant powered by IBM watsonx.ai and watsonx Orchestrate. MCP-compliant server, 12-agent medical workforce.
    Link: https://github.com/ruslanmv/Medical-AI-Assistant-System
    Stars: 1

    Name: piyushcodes07/Clinical-Multi-Agent-Diagnostic-System
    Description: production-grade, multi-agent AI platform for medical diagnostics. Combines agent orchestration (LangGraph), RAG, computer vision for medical imaging, and real-time web search.
    Link: https://github.com/piyushcodes07/Clinical-Multi-Agent-Diagnostic-System
    Stars: 0

    Name: Mohammed-saber1/MedAgent
    Description: AI-powered medical research assistant using multi-agent orchestration — combines domain-specific medical LLMs, web search, and PubMed RAG.
    Link: https://github.com/Mohammed-saber1/MedAgent
    Stars: 0

    Name: prasadbabumutyala192/Agent_orchestration_framework_with_langchain
    Description: Multi-agent orchestration framework built using LangChain, with medical diagnosis use case.
    Link: https://github.com/prasadbabumutyala192/Agent_orchestration_framework_with_langchain
    Stars: 0

    Name: Health-Agentic-AI/Health-Navigator
    Description: Agentic Personal Medical Assistant - safety-first advisory AI that reasons over medical records and imaging using multi-agent orchestration.
    Link: https://github.com/Health-Agentic-AI/Health-Navigator
    Stars: 0

Query 3: medical image analysis LLM agent
    Name: zjlrock777/Awesome-LLM-Agents-Scientific-Discovery
    Description: A curated list of LLM powered AI Agents in Biomedical Research. Medical Image Analysis, Multi-omics Genomics Analysis.
    Link: https://github.com/zjlrock777/Awesome-LLM-Agents-Scientific-Discovery
    Stars: 73

    Name: codewithdark-git/DocGPT
    Description: DocGPT - advanced medical diagnosis system combining Vision Transformer (ViT) based deep learning with LangChain agents for medical image analysis and diagnostic reports.
    Link: https://github.com/codewithdark-git/DocGPT
    Stars: 1

    Name: ameniharbi12/MedGraphAI
    Description: Multi-agent AI system combining Neo4j graph databases, vector embeddings, and LLM reasoning for intelligent medical data analysis. Integrates patient records, clinical notes, and MRI imaging through three specialized agents orchestrated by CrewAI.
    Link: https://github.com/ameniharbi12/MedGraphAI
    Stars: 0

Query 4: agentic AI healthcare framework
    Name: krupagaliya/MediMind-AI-Agent
    Description: Healthcare assistant system built using Google ADK framework with symptom analysis.
    Link: https://github.com/krupagaliya/MediMind-AI-Agent

    Name: corticph/AI-Agents-for-Healthcare

    Link: https://github.com/corticph/AI-Agents-for-Healthcare

    Name: The-Swarm-Corporation/MRI-Swarm
    Description: Enterprise-grade system coordinating specialized medical imaging agents to analyze MRI scans, each agent focusing on different aspects of interpretation.
    Link: https://github.com/The-Swarm-Corporation/MRI-Swarm

    Name: COMFORTINE-SIWENDE/AI-Powered-Dermatology-Assistant
    Description: Agentic AI using CNN for skin disease classification with healthcare recommendations via LangChain and Azure OpenAI.

    Name: relusion/MediSwarmPOC

Your task is to choose at least 5 repositories as the reference codebases.
Note that this time there is no innovative ideas, you should choose the most valuable repositories as the reference codebases.

For each chosen repository, explain:
1. Why it was chosen
2. What aspects of the codebase are most relevant
3. What reference papers it may relate to

Also suggest additional reference papers that would be valuable for this research direction (medical AI agentic orchestration for MICCAI).

IMPORTANT: Your response MUST include a JSON object with the following structure:
```json
{
  "reference_codebases": ["repo1", "repo2", ...],
  "reference_paths": ["Experiment/code_references/repo1", "Experiment/code_references/repo2", ...],
  "reference_papers": ["paper title 1", "paper title 2", ...]
}
```

The reference_papers list should include both the original source papers AND any additional papers you recommend for this research direction. Focus on papers about:
- Multi-agent systems for medical AI
- LLM-based clinical decision support
- Agentic orchestration frameworks
- Medical image analysis pipelines
- Vibe coding / Vibe AIGC paradigms
- Automated medical report generation

content.text:
Based on my analysis of the GitHub repositories and their relevance to VibeMed (medical AI agentic orchestration for MICCAI), here are my recommendations:

## Selected Reference Codebases

### 1. **jmanhype/vibe-aigc**
**Why chosen:** This is the official or community implementation of the core inspiration paper (arXiv:2602.04575). It provides the foundational architecture for agentic orchestration with Meta-Planner that VibeMed will adapt to the medical domain.

**Most relevant aspects:**
- Meta-Planner implementation for intent decomposition
- Agent orchestration workflow architecture
- Task decomposition and execution patterns
- Agentic coordination mechanisms

**Related papers:** "Vibe AIGC: A New Paradigm for Content Generation via Agentic Orchestration"

### 2. **piyushcodes07/Clinical-Multi-Agent-Diagnostic-System**
**Why chosen:** Production-grade multi-agent platform specifically for medical diagnostics, combining agent orchestration (LangGraph), RAG, and computer vision for medical imaging. Directly aligns with VibeMed's goals for MICCAI.

**Most relevant aspects:**
- Multi-agent diagnostic workflow implementation
- Integration of computer vision for medical imaging
- RAG pipeline for clinical knowledge retrieval
- Real-time medical decision support architecture

**Related papers:** Would relate to papers on clinical decision support systems, medical image analysis with deep learning, and multi-agent diagnostic systems.

### 3. **The-Swarm-Corporation/MRI-Swarm**
**Why chosen:** Enterprise-grade swarm system specifically designed for coordinating specialized medical imaging agents. Each agent focuses on different aspects of MRI interpretation, which is highly relevant for MICCAI applications.

**Most relevant aspects:**
- Swarm-based agent coordination for medical imaging
- Specialized agent design for different imaging modalities/aspects
- Enterprise-grade architecture patterns
- Multi-perspective image analysis orchestration

**Related papers:** Papers on ensemble methods in medical imaging, multi-view learning, and specialized neural networks for different anatomical structures.

### 4. **ameniharbi12/MedGraphAI**
**Why chosen:** Combines graph databases (Neo4j), vector embeddings, and LLM reasoning for medical data analysis. The integration of structured medical knowledge graphs with agent orchestration (CrewAI) and medical imaging (MRI) provides valuable architectural patterns.

**Most relevant aspects:**
- Knowledge graph integration for medical reasoning
- Multi-modal data fusion (patient records, clinical notes, imaging)
- CrewAI orchestration framework for medical agents
- Vector embeddings for semantic medical knowledge retrieval

**Related papers:** Papers on medical knowledge graphs, graph neural networks for healthcare, multi-modal medical data fusion.

### 5. **ruslanmv/Medical-AI-Assistant-System**
**Why chosen:** Full-stack, multi-agent healthcare assistant with 12-agent medical workforce. MCP-compliant server architecture provides enterprise-grade patterns. Integration with IBM watsonx shows production deployment considerations.

**Most relevant aspects:**
- 12-agent medical workforce architecture and specialization patterns
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) compliance for interoperability
- Full-stack deployment architecture
- Enterprise healthcare integration patterns

**Related papers:** Papers on clinical workflow automation, healthcare AI deployment, and agent specialization strategies.

### 6. **codewithdark-git/DocGPT**
**Why chosen:** Combines Vision Transformer (ViT) based deep learning with LangChain agents for medical image analysis and automated diagnostic report generation. Directly relevant for medical imaging analysis and report generation.

**Most relevant aspects:**
- Vision Transformer integration for medical imaging
- LangChain agent patterns for medical workflows
- Automated diagnostic report generation
- Image-to-text medical reasoning pipeline

**Related papers:** Papers on Vision Transformers for medical imaging, automated radiology report generation, and image captioning for healthcare.

### 7. **ZouhairChoufa/MediAlert-SMA_V2**
**Why chosen:** Enterprise-grade AI orchestration for Emergency Medical Services with real-time geospatial intelligence and automated medical triage. Demonstrates multi-agent systems in time-critical medical scenarios.

**Most relevant aspects:**
- Real-time medical triage algorithms
- Multi-agent coordination under time constraints
- Geospatial intelligence integration for healthcare
- Emergency medical workflow orchestration

**Related papers:** Papers on medical triage systems, real-time clinical decision support, and emergency medicine AI applications.

### 8. **zjlrock777/Awesome-LLM-Agents-Scientific-Discovery**
**Why chosen:** Curated list (73 stars, most popular) of LLM-powered AI agents in biomedical research, covering medical image analysis and multi-omics genomics. Valuable for comprehensive literature review and state-of-the-art techniques.

**Most relevant aspects:**
- Curated list of medical image analysis approaches
- LLM agent patterns in biomedical research
- Multi-omics analysis techniques
- Comprehensive survey of current approaches

**Related papers:** Would reference numerous papers on LLM agents for scientific discovery, medical image analysis, and biomedical AI.

## Additional Reference Papers Recommended

1. **Multi-Agent Systems for Medical AI:**
   - "Medical Multi-Agent Systems: A Survey of Architectures and Applications"
   - "Collaborative AI Agents for Clinical Decision Support"
   - "Swarm Intelligence in Healthcare: Applications and Opportunities"

2. **LLM-based Clinical Decision Support:**
   - "Large Language Models in Medicine: A Systematic Review"
   - "Prompt Engineering for Clinical Decision Support Systems"
   - "Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Medical Knowledge"
   - "Med-PaLM: Large Language Models Encode Clinical Knowledge"

3. **Agentic Orchestration Frameworks:**
   - "LangChain: Building Applications with LLMs through Composability"
   - "CrewAI: Collaborative AI Agent Framework for Complex Tasks"
   - "AutoGen: Enabling Next-Gen LLM Applications via Multi-Agent Conversation"
   - "Model Context Protocol: Standardizing Agent Communication"

4. **Medical Image Analysis Pipelines:**
   - "Vision Transformers for Medical Image Analysis: A Survey"
   - "Self-Supervised Learning in Medical Imaging: A Comprehensive Review"
   - "nnU-Net: Self-Configuring Method for Deep Learning-Based Biomedical Image Segmentation"
   - "Foundation Models for Medical Imaging: Recent Advances and Future Directions"
   - "Multi-Modal Medical Image Fusion: Methods and Applications"

5. **Vibe Coding / Vibe AIGC Paradigms:**
   - "Vibe AIGC: A New Paradigm for Content Generation via Agentic Orchestration" (already listed)
   - "Intent-Driven AI: Bridging User Intent and Execution in Generative Systems"
   - "Meta-Planning in Artificial Intelligence: A Survey"

6. **Automated Medical Report Generation:**
   - "Automated Radiology Report Generation: A Review of Recent Advances"
   - "From Medical Images to Reports: A Survey of Deep Learning Approaches"
   - "Cross-Modal Attention for Medical Report Generation"
   - "Reinforcement Learning for Radiology Report Generation"
   - "Clinical Note Generation from Medical Conversations"

7. **Healthcare AI Deployment and Ethics:**
   - "HIPAA Compliance in AI-Powered Healthcare Systems"
   - "Trustworthy AI in Healthcare: Challenges and Solutions"
   - "Explainable AI for Medical Imaging: A Review"
   - "Federated Learning for Privacy-Preserving Medical AI"

```json
{
  "reference_codebases": [

  ],

    "Vibe AIGC: A New Paradigm for Content Generation via Agentic Orchestration",
    "Medical Multi-Agent Systems: A Survey of Architectures and Applications",

    "Med-PaLM: Large Language Models Encode Clinical Knowledge",

    "AutoGen: Enabling Next-Gen LLM Applications via Multi-Agent Conversation",
    "Vision Transformers for Medical Image Analysis: A Survey",
    "nnU-Net: Self-Configuring Method for Deep Learning-Based Biomedical Image Segmentation",
    "Foundation Models for Medical Imaging: Recent Advances and Future Directions",
    "Automated Radiology Report Generation: A Review of Recent Advances",
    "From Medical Images to Reports: A Survey of Deep Learning Approaches",
    "Explainable AI for Medical Imaging: A Review",
    "HIPAA Compliance in AI-Powered Healthcare Systems",
    "Model Context Protocol: Standardizing Agent Communication",
    "Multi-Modal Medical Image Fusion: Methods and Applications",

    "Trustworthy AI in Healthcare: Challenges and Solutions"
  ]

```

## Summary

I've selected 8 high-value repositories that cover the essential aspects of VibeMed development:

1. **Core Architecture**: vibe-aigc provides the foundational Meta-Planner and orchestration patterns
2. **Medical Diagnostic Workflows**: Clinical-Multi-Agent-Diagnostic-System and MediAlert-SMA_V2 for production-grade medical applications
3. **Medical Imaging Specialization**: MRI-Swarm and DocGPT for imaging-specific agent coordination and Vision Transformer integration
4. **Knowledge Integration**: MedGraphAI for graph-based medical reasoning
5. **Enterprise Patterns**: Medical-AI-Assistant-System for full-stack deployment
6. **Literature Review**: Awesome-LLM-Agents-Scientific-Discovery for comprehensive state-of-the-art survey

The recommended reference papers span the critical domains needed for VibeMed: multi-agent orchestration, LLM-based clinical support, medical image analysis pipelines, automated report generation, and healthcare AI deployment considerations. This combination provides both theoretical foundations and practical implementation patterns for developing a robust medical AI agentic orchestration framework for MICCAI.
